changes.summary: Created 003_indexes.sql with 14 GIN indexes (arrays), 1 FTS index (knowledge), 25+ B-tree indexes (status, category, FKs, timestamps, agent). Partial indexes for sparse columns (agent, severity, started_at, completed_at).

reasoning_trace.detail: GIN for all TEXT[] and JSONB columns that need containment queries (@>, ?). FTS on knowledge title+content with english stemmer. B-tree on every FK (PostgreSQL doesn't auto-index FK columns), all status/category filters, and timestamps for range queries.
Used partial indexes (WHERE IS NOT NULL) for sparse columns to reduce index bloat. Agent index partial since most tasks are single-agent.

changes.summary: Created PostgreSQLAdapter implementing StorageAdapter Protocol. ~430 lines. Uses psycopg2 ThreadedConnectionPool, row↔dict converters, entity→table mapping, tracker-specific handling (project row + task rows), upsert logic, global entity support (project_id IS NULL).

reasoning_trace.detail: Sync adapter using psycopg2 (not asyncpg) for compatibility with existing core modules which are synchronous. FastAPI uses asyncpg separately. Row↔dict conversion handles ext_id→id mapping, JSONB serialization, timestamp formatting, and array columns.

6 Protocol methods: load_data (query+convert), save_data (upsert+delete removed), exists (project check + entity check), list_projects (slug query), load_global (WHERE project_id IS NULL), save_global (upsert with NULL project_id). Tracker entity is special-cased: needs project row + task rows combined.

Used _ENTITY_TABLE_MAP for table routing. _JSONB_COLUMNS and _ARRAY_COLUMNS sets for type handling. save_data does full sync: inserts new, updates existing, deletes removed items. This matches JSONFileStorage's behavior of replacing the entire file.

changes.summary: Deep-verify fixes: 4 CRITICAL + 5 IMPORTANT resolved. Added per-entity timestamp mapping (changes→recorded_at, decisions/lessons→timestamp). Added _TABLE_COLUMNS allow-lists to filter unknown dict keys (prevents SQL errors from claimed_at etc). Removed broken psycopg3 fallback. Added conn.rollback() for read transactions. Added updated_at=NOW() on entity updates. Removed dead _cursor method. Added exception chaining (from e). Fixed double-close guard. Added context manager protocol.

reasoning_trace.detail: F1: Added _ENTITY_TS_OVERRIDES and _DB_TS_TO_JSON for per-entity timestamp mapping. F2: Added _TABLE_COLUMNS per table to filter out unknown keys like claimed_at, started_at_commit. F3: Reverse TS mapping in _row_to_dict. F4: Removed psycopg3 fallback (was non-functional).

F8: _save_entity_list now adds updated_at=NOW() conditionally. F9: All read methods (load_data, exists, list_projects, load_global) now call conn.rollback() in finally block. F10: Removed dead _cursor method. F14: Exception chaining via 'from e'. F15/F16: close() sets pool=None, added __enter__/__exit__.

changes.summary: Created KnowledgeVersioningService with 6 methods: create_version (auto-increment + insert), list_versions (metadata only), get_version (full content), diff_versions (unified diff via difflib), rollback (non-destructive new version from target), ensure_initial_version (idempotent v1 creation). ~260 lines.

reasoning_trace.detail: Service class with connection factory injection (not tied to PostgreSQLAdapter). Uses psycopg2 RealDictCursor for row access. Each method manages its own connection lifecycle (acquire, use, commit/rollback, release). create_version accepts optional conn parameter for transactional use within larger operations.

create_version: SELECT current_version → INSERT version row → UPDATE knowledge.current_version. diff_versions: calls get_version twice then uses difflib.unified_diff. rollback: calls get_version(target) → create_version(content from target) → UPDATE knowledge.content.

changes.summary: Deep-verify rewrite: Fixed 4 CRITICAL (pool-based connections with getconn/putconn, SELECT FOR UPDATE for race prevention, atomic single-transaction rollback, conn parameter threading). Fixed 4 IMPORTANT (ensure_initial_version syncs current_version, diff_versions uses single connection, splitlines without keepends, update_content parameter).

reasoning_trace.detail: F-02: Rollback now uses single connection/transaction instead of 3 separate ones. F-03: create_version uses SELECT ... FOR UPDATE to lock the knowledge row. F-04: Changed from get_conn callable to pool object with getconn/putconn lifecycle.

ensure_initial_version also syncs current_version=1. diff_versions fetches both versions in single query. Added update_content param to create_version for rollback use. get_version accepts optional conn param.

changes.summary: Deep-verify F-01 fix: Integrated KnowledgeVersioningService into PostgreSQLAdapter. On knowledge INSERT: ensure_initial_version creates v1. On knowledge UPDATE with changed content: create_version creates new version. Both use same transaction via cur.connection. Added _get_knowledge_db_id helper. Graceful degradation if versioning import fails.

reasoning_trace.detail: F-01 found versioning service was never called. Wired into _save_entity_list: detects knowledge table, loads existing content for diff comparison, calls versioning service within same transaction. Pool shared between adapter and versioning service.

Pre-loads existing content in one query before the upsert loop. Passes cur.connection (not cur) to versioning methods since they open their own cursors. _versioning initialized in __init__ and reused.

changes.summary: Created KnowledgeImpactService for PostgreSQL-mode impact analysis. Queries 6 data sources: knowledge_links (polymorphic JOINs), task_knowledge (junction), tasks/ideas/objectives.knowledge_ids (array @> containment), knowledge.dependencies (reverse deps). Returns structured report with impact levels (high/medium/low) based on relation weights. Deduplicates by (entity_type, entity_id) keeping highest-impact relation.

reasoning_trace.detail: Service class taking pool object (same pattern as KnowledgeVersioningService). 6 query methods cover all knowledge linkage paths in the schema. Polymorphic knowledge_links resolved via _resolve_entity helper. Array containment uses GIN-indexed @> operator for efficiency.
Three levels mapped from relation weights: required/depends_on → high (3), uses/context → medium (2), reference → low (1). Dedup keeps highest weight when same entity appears from multiple sources.

changes.summary: Added KnowledgeImpactService integration to PostgreSQLAdapter: import, __init__ initialization, and analyze_knowledge_impact() method that resolves ext_id → DB id and delegates to the service. Graceful fallback if impact module not importable.

reasoning_trace.detail: Same pattern as versioning: try/except import, pool-based init in __init__, public method on adapter for API/CLI use. analyze_knowledge_impact accepts (project, ext_id) and returns structured dict.

changes.summary: Created forge-migrate tool (~420 lines). changes.summary: Next.js 14 project setup with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, App Router. Button (4 variants), Card with header/title, Badge with status variant mapping
Multi-stage build: deps → builder → runner with standalone output, non-root user

changes.summary: Deep-verify fixes: (F-003) Added .eslintrc.json for next/core-web-vitals. (F-004) Content-Type only set when request has body. (F-001) Added logout(). (F-005) WebSocket CONNECTING guard prevents duplicate connections. (F-007) Sidebar active state uses startsWith for nested routes.

reasoning_trace.detail: ESLint config needed for npm run lint to work
GET/DELETE requests should not send Content-Type: application/json
Rapid connect() calls could create multiple WebSocket instances

changes.summary: Full TypeScript type definitions for all 11 Forge entities (Project, Task, Decision, Objective, Idea, ChangeRecord, Guideline, Knowledge, Lesson, ACTemplate, Gate) with Create/Update interfaces and enum union types.

changes.summary: React hook wrapping ForgeWebSocket class. Auto-connects on mount for given project slug, disconnects on cleanup. Exposes connected state, on() and onAny() subscription methods.

reasoning_trace.detail: useEffect manages connect/disconnect lifecycle tied to slug changes
useCallback ensures stable handler references for consumers

changes.summary: Deep-verify fixes: (F-001..F-004) Fixed Project/ProjectStatus types to match actual API response shapes. Added ObjectiveUpdate, ACTemplateUpdate, LessonPromote types. Added proper literal types for KnowledgeLink, ACTemplateCategory, ObjectiveStatus.

reasoning_trace.detail: All entity types were missing fields present in Pydantic models, causing runtime access to undefined properties
Project endpoints returned different field names (project vs slug, created vs created_at) than types declared

changes.summary: Deep-verify fixes: (F-001..F-016) Fixed all return types — create methods return {added: string[], total: number} not entity arrays. Fixed projects.list/create/get/status return types. Fixed tasks.claimNext to send agent as query param instead of body. Fixed guidelines.context to return {must,should,may,total}. Fixed acTemplates.instantiate body shape and return type. Fixed gates.create return type to {configured: number}. (F-038..F-045) Added missing methods: objectives.update, acTemplates.update, gates.check, auth.me, changes.autoDetect, knowledge.getVersion. Fixed request() to preserve init.headers.

reasoning_trace.detail: All create endpoints return ID arrays, not full entity objects — consumer code would get undefined on field access
tasks.claimNext agent param declared as Query() in FastAPI but was sent as JSON body — silently ignored
6 API endpoints had no client methods — objectives.update, acTemplates.update, gates.check, auth.me, changes.auto, knowledge.getVersion

changes.summary: Zustand store for project state: slug list, current project selection, project detail/status caching, create project with optimistic update. All methods use typed API client.

reasoning_trace.detail: Simple flat store — projects are top-level nav, not deeply nested
Details and statuses cached by slug to avoid refetching on navigation

changes.summary: Generic entity store managing all 10 entity types (tasks, decisions, objectives, ideas, changes, guidelines, knowledge, lessons, acTemplates, gates). Features: per-type slices with loading/error, typed CRUD actions for each entity, WebSocket event handler for real-time updates, generic fetchEntities for list operations.

reasoning_trace.detail: Single store with per-type slices avoids 10 separate stores while keeping type safety via typed action methods
handleEvent maps WS event names to entity types and merges payloads into slices
Server-first for most operations; optimistic removed from task updates to avoid type union issues

changes.summary: Execution store tracking task execution lifecycle: claim next task, phase transitions (idle→claiming→gathering-context→executing→validating→completing), log streaming, gate check results, progress tracking, task completion.

reasoning_trace.detail: ExecutionPhase enum mirrors the /next skill workflow steps for UI display

changes.summary: Deep-verify fixes: (F-002) task.failed now handled as update not create — prevented duplicate tasks. (F-005/F-006) All create* methods now have loading/error state via withCreateLoading helper. (F-007) All update* methods have error handling via withUpdate helper. (F-009/F-010) removeTask is optimistic with rollback — uses get() for previous state capture. (F-012) fetchEntities uses request sequence numbers to discard stale responses. reasoning_trace.detail: task.failed appended duplicate instead of updating existing — changed eventMap to explicit op types
withCreateLoading and withUpdate DRY helpers replaced 10 copy-pasted patterns

changes.summary: Implemented POST/GET/DELETE /api/v1/llm/chat/files endpoints in llm_chat.py. Files stored in Redis with 1h TTL (chat:file:{uuid}), session tracking via chat:session:{session_id}:files set, 1MB size limit, file type validation, max 10 files per session, PDF text extraction. Added get_session_file_contents() helper for LLM context injection. Added python-multipart dependency.

changes.summary: Created SkillStorageService in forge-api/app/services/skill_storage.py. Implements: list_skills (dir scan), get_skill, create_skill (slug validation, uniqueness check, auto-generated SKILL.md), save_skill (merge config + optional content), delete_skill (shutil.rmtree). File ops: list_files, get_file, save_file, delete_file, move_file with path prefix validation and traversal protection. Per-skill asyncio.Lock via dict. Auto-creates skills_dir. Reuses frontmatter.py for SKILL.md parsing.

changes.summary: Created GitSyncService in forge-api/app/services/git_sync.py. init_or_clone: clones or verifies .git, handles existing content via init+remote add. pull: fetch+reset --hard origin/{branch}, calls resync_index. push: stages only sync:true skill dirs, commits, pushes. status: local changes, ahead/behind counts, branch info. Graceful: GitSyncNotConfigured when no URL, GitSyncError for git issues.

changes.summary: Created ClaudeCodeProvider in core/llm/providers/claude_code.py. Implements full LLMProvider protocol: complete() (JSON mode), stream() (NDJSON), capabilities() (tool_use=False, cost=0), list_models() (static). Key features: Windows process tree cleanup via taskkill, bounded session map with LRU eviction, CLAUDECODE env var clearing, system prompt via temp file, CRLF-safe streaming, is_error response checking, empty prompt validation. Deep-verify found and fixed 4 issues (C-3 process tree, I-1 session map, I-4 is_error, I-5 empty prompt). CompletionConfig.metadata field was already present from prior session.

changes.summary: Added resume-failure fallback: both complete() and stream() detect --resume errors, evict stale session mapping, and retry with full conversation history. Added clear_session(forge_session_id) for explicit cleanup. Extracted _stream_subprocess() and _parse_stream_events() to handle retry logic cleanly. Documented thread safety: safe for asyncio single-threaded loop, NOT for multi-threaded access.

changes.summary: Modified AgentLoop to use stream() when provider.capabilities().supports_streaming=True AND config.tools is empty. Added _stream_call() helper that accumulates content from StreamChunks while emitting real-time StreamEvent('token') for each chunk. For complete() path (tools active), behavior is unchanged — full response emitted as single token event. Claude Code provider always streams (supports_tool_use=False means tools never injected). No behavior change for Anthropic/OpenAI with active tools.

changes.summary: Added contextId extraction to useScopeResolver (from regex capture group 2 on detail page routes) and wired it through AISidebar → LLMChat. Backend context_resolver already handles task/objective/idea/knowledge resolvers, so LLM now receives full entity context when user views detail pages. List pages and global pages correctly return contextId=null (falls through to empty string).

changes.summary: Created SlashCommandDropdown component with 21 built-in forge commands + dynamic skill commands from skillStore. Integrated into ChatInput: detects '/' at position 0 (not mid-sentence), shows filtered dropdown above textarea, supports ArrowUp/Down navigation, Enter/Tab selection, Escape dismissal. Commands deduped (built-in wins over skill if same name).

changes.summary: Enhanced existing ToolCallBlock with error state detection and visual differentiation. Added draftPlan/approvePlan to TOOL_TO_ENTITY in wsDispatcher.ts for auto-refresh. Updated global system prompt in context_resolver.py to list new Planning tools.

changes.summary: Added getTaskContext tool in tool_registry.py that loads full execution context: scoped guidelines (by task scopes + general), knowledge objects (by knowledge_ids), dependency chain (completed deps with their changes and decisions), active risks (type=risk linked to origin, not CLOSED), and business context (origin objective with KR progress or idea with linked objective). Direct storage implementation consistent with all other handlers. Also added capability to capabilities.ts and updated context_resolver.py system prompt.

changes.summary: Added 2 verification tools: runGates runs configured gate commands via asyncio subprocess with 120s timeout, captures pass/fail per gate with output snippets, stores gate_results on task in tracker. getProjectStatus computes task counts by status, identifies blocked tasks (unmet deps or blocked_by_decisions), includes draft plan info. Added verification scope to capabilities.ts and updated system prompt.

changes.summary: Created /sessions page with card grid layout. Each session card shows type badge (color-coded: plan=blue, execute=green, verify=amber, compound=purple), status dot, target entity ID, context info, message count, token usage (in/out), model, and relative time. Filters for type/status/project/search. Stats summary in header. Added ChatSession type fields for session_type/session_status/target_entity. Navigation link added to TopNavBar, route registered in useScopeResolver.

changes.summary: Added typed AI session launch buttons to entity detail pages. Objective detail: 'Plan with AI' (blue, session_type=plan). Task detail: 'Execute with AI' (green, session_type=execute) and 'Verify with AI' (amber, session_type=verify). Idea detail: 'Research with AI' (purple, session_type=chat with target_entity_type=idea). Added pendingSessionMeta mechanism in chatStore — buttons set it, sendMessage auto-consumes it on new session creation. Backend ChatRequest extended with target_entity_type/target_entity_id, passed through to SessionManager.create().

changes.summary: Created /sessions/[id] page with two-panel layout: scrollable message list using existing Message component on the left, metadata sidebar on the right. Sidebar shows session type/status badges, target entity via EntityLink, context info, model/token/cost stats, duration calculation, and timestamps. Entity IDs extracted from tool call results via regex matching [TDKOIGLR]-NNN patterns. Session list page cards now clickable linking to detail. Route registered in useScopeResolver.

changes.summary: Added ContextSidebar component to decision detail page. Lazy-loads related task (with description, status, origin), traces origin chain (task→idea→objective via advances_key_results), fetches applicable guidelines by task scopes, searches for source LLM session when decided_by=claude, and displays evidence_refs. Uses two-column layout (main content + sidebar).

changes.summary: Implemented blocking decision session pause mechanism. Agent loop detects risk decisions with critical/high severity after createDecision tool execution and pauses with stop_reason=blocked_by_decision. Backend sets session status to paused with pause_reason and blocked_by_decision_id fields. POST /sessions/{id}/resume endpoint clears pause and restores active status. Frontend wsDispatcher auto-resumes blocked sessions when decision.closed event arrives. Sessions page shows 'awaiting decision' indicator with decision ID on paused cards.

Frontend wsDispatcher auto-resumes blocked sessions when decision.closed event arrives. Sessions page shows 'awaiting decision' indicator with decision ID on paused cards.

changes.summary: Created NotificationCenter component with bell icon in TopNavBar. Fetches open decisions across all projects and paused sessions. Shows unread count badge, dropdown with type icons (D for decisions, ! for risks, P for paused sessions), title, project, and relative time. Click navigates to entity. Dismissed notifications tracked in localStorage (bounded to 500 entries). Background refresh every 30s for badge count. Outside-click closes dropdown.

changes.summary: Fixed BottomPanel slug passing: usePathname() extracts slug from URL pathname via regex, passed as prop to LlmMonitor, EventStream, ApiInspector. All three components accept slug prop. LlmMonitor and EventStream show disabled state when slug is null. SWR keys null-guarded. No useParams() calls remain. Changes already committed in 7484e3e9.

changes.summary: Investigation found chat.token events lacked block_type discriminator — both thinking and token StreamEvents mapped to same WS event type. Added block_type field to payload in llm_chat.py on_event callback. Decision D-084 recorded. Backward compatible change.

changes.summary: Created useStreamDebug hook with ref+subscription pattern per L-018/D-063 to avoid infinite re-renders. Hook subscribes to WS chat events via debug listener callback, accumulates in useRef, throttles React state to 100ms. Created 5 stream view components: ThinkingBlock (collapsible purple), StreamToolCallBlock (name/params/result/status), ResponseBlock (text + cursor), ErrorBlock, StreamView (orchestrator). All have AI annotations per G-017.

changes.summary: Added Debug tab as 5th tab in AI Sidebar. DebugTab always mounted (uses CSS hidden attr) so it captures stream events even when not the active tab. Uses useStreamDebug hook + StreamView. Metadata bar shows model, token counts, elapsed time. Clear button resets. Pulsing dot on tab label during streaming via lightweight subscribeToStreamEvents listener. SidebarTab type updated in both AISidebar.tsx and sidebarStore.ts.
